title: Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products: What It Actually Is and How It Works — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling a digital product should be simple. You create something valuable — an ebook, a course, a Notion template, a font, a preset pack, a beat — and someone pays you for access to it. The file transfers. The transaction completes. But for millions of creators, the payment layer is where everything breaks down. PayPal is unavailable. Stripe requires a local bank account that links to an unsupported country. Gumroad holds payouts. The workarounds stop working. What actually works is a crypto-native stack: a static store on GitHub Pages, payment processing through NOWPayments, and automated delivery that sends the download link the moment a transaction confirms on-chain. No middleman. No platform risk. No geography filter.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A crypto payment gateway for digital products is a revolutionary solution that lets creators sell their ebooks, courses, and other digital goods without relying on traditional payment processors. This means no more geo-restrictions, no more banking limitations, and no more complicated setup processes. By leveraging the power of cryptocurrency, creators can tap into a new audience and monetize their digital wares in ways previously impossible.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At the heart of this solution lies a powerful combination of blockchain technology and decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols. Web3 Wallet Connect, our frontend wallet integration tool, allows buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency using a multi-chain QR code. Meanwhile, NOWPayments, our payment processor, handles the secure transfer of funds in real-time. This seamless integration enables instant automated delivery of digital products, eliminating the need for manual payment processing and reducing the risk of chargebacks and disputes.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is specifically designed for digital creators in restricted countries, such as Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and Pakistan, who struggle to access global markets due to geo-restrictions and banking limitations. It's also ideal for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores who need a hassle-free payment solution that integrates seamlessly with their existing infrastructure. By using our crypto payment gateway, creators can unlock new revenue streams and tap into a global audience that was previously inaccessible.
Selling digital products without PayPal or Gumroad just got a whole lot easier.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our crypto payment gateway consists of three key components: the Core Shop Engine, which handles automated delivery and payment verification; Web3 Wallet Connect, our frontend wallet integration tool that enables multi-chain QR code payments; and NOWPayments, our payment processor that handles secure fund transfers in real-time. Together, these components provide a fully automated, geo-restricted, and banking-limited-friendly payment solution that's tailored to the needs of digital creators.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling your digital products using our crypto payment gateway, follow these simple steps: integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website using our easy-to-use API; set up your Core Shop Engine with automated delivery and payment verification; and connect your account to NOWPayments for seamless fund transfers. Once you've completed these steps, you'll be able to sell your digital wares to a global audience without the need for traditional payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell templates and fonts without using Gumroad or Payhip? Yes, you can. Our crypto payment gateway allows you to bypass traditional payment processors and sell your digital products directly to a global audience without restrictions. Simply integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website and set up your Core Shop Engine with automated delivery and payment verification.
Bypass geo-restrictions and banking limitations with our crypto payment gateway.

If you're looking for ways to sell ebooks without PayPal, or want to create a digital download store that accepts cryptocurrency only, our crypto payment gateway is the perfect solution. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
